calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Continued To Oct-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lelsie Arnal appeared via zoom for Walter Miller (petitioner).

Counsel confirmed that the QDRO is complete in the family court matter, that papers have been submitted to the legal department, and that they are requesting a 6-month continuance. The matter is continued to October 27, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: A. Datt; Deputy: Not reported (D204).

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Leslie Arnal appeared via zoom for Walter MiIller (petitioner).

Ms. Arnal stated that she would need 6 months to extend letters of special administration. The extended letters of special administration is set to expire April 28, 2026. The matter is continued to April 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Leslie Arnal, Esq., for Walter Miller, Petitioner.

Counsel reports to the court regarding the need for Letters of Special Administration. Counsel confirms that notice of this hearing was provided to all interested parties.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is taken under submission. Counsel is instructed to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
